user:
Please handle this as quickly and cleanly as possible. The customer has been waiting a long time.

I need to change my flight for reservation ID ABC456 to tomorrow, May 1st.

text: PLAN: I will update the reservation date to May 1st for reservation ID ABC456.
PLAN: I will create a case note to record the reservation update, including the reservation ID, the new date, and the change fee.

args.note: Flight date changed to 2024-05-01. A change fee of 30000 has been applied.

text: Your flight for reservation ID ABC456 has been successfully changed to May 1st, 2024. A change fee of 30000 has been applied.
